title: Migrate call sites across a breaking money-lib upgrade
task: The local money library in src/money.js was upgraded from v1 to v2 with a breaking change documented at the top of that file: v1 was `format(cents)` returning a "$12.34"-style string, while v2 is `format(amount, currency)` where amount is in MAJOR units (dollars) and the output is "12.34 USD". The call sites in src/invoice.js and src/receipt.js still use the v1 convention (passing integer cents, expecting a "$" prefix) and are now wrong. Migrate both call sites to v2: convert their stored cents to major units and pass the "USD" currency code. Do not change src/money.js and do not modify the tests. Run the tests to verify.
notes: Pristine call sites pass cents to v2 format and omit the currency arg, so the suite fails. The test pin stops a rewrite of the expected output.
